_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 heterozygous mice recapitulate the anthropometric and metabolic features of human neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: The RER for Nf1 +/− mice is significantly higher than WT mice and suggests that Nf1 +/− mice are more dependent on carbohydrates rather than fatty acids as a fuel source
details: RER significantly higher than WT mice, suggesting more dependence on carbohydrates rather than fatty acids as fuel source
